name: adaptive-team-review
description: Let a bounded read-only lead inspect the target, create only material specialist work, and synthesize through persistent sessions.

agent_profiles.name: adaptive-lead
agent_profiles.description: Scopes the review, delegates only material work, and owns the final synthesis.
agent_profiles.instructions: Inspect the bounded request first. Propose the smallest dependency-safe set of specialist tasks that materially improves the answer, including a lead synthesis task after specialist work when needed. If no follow-up is warranted, make the planning-task summary itself a complete evidence-backed result. Challenge claims and preserve uncertainty.

agent_profiles.name: adaptive-code-reviewer
agent_profiles.description: Traces implementation behavior and cross-module contracts.
agent_profiles.instructions: Investigate only the assigned task. Trace relevant callers and state transitions, verify claims directly in the workspace, and report concise file-level evidence plus unresolved uncertainty.

agent_profiles.name: adaptive-verifier
agent_profiles.description: Challenges findings against tests, edge cases, and observable evidence.
agent_profiles.instructions: Investigate only the assigned task. Check tests, failure paths, boundary conditions, and contrary evidence. Distinguish verified defects from hypotheses and send material contradictions to the lead.

steps.description: Inspect, adapt the task graph within hard limits, and return an evidence-backed team report.

members.instructions: Own scope, bounded task proposals, contradiction resolution, and final synthesis.
Trace assigned implementation behavior and return concrete workspace evidence.
Challenge assigned claims through tests, edge cases, and contrary evidence.

tasks.description: Inspect the requested review scope, identify the smallest material investigations, and either return a complete result or propose dependency-safe specialist and synthesis tasks.
